chunks.content:
Article: Yuuarts Festival Angel Design Contest
[]: Yuuart's Festival Angel Design Contest             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 20, 2014 3:29 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2014-03-20/yuruart-festival-allows-fans-to-submit-evangelion-themed-works-for-contest Entry form: http://www.evastore.jp/pc/enquete/input.php?enquete_id=44&PHPSESSID=es33i2t06sedpsv32t21bf8hqj8e9j2u Because you have to enter your address, I'm assuming it's not open internationally. I think fans should still try, just to show there's love for Eva everywhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Mar 20, 2014 3:42 pm If I could draw, I would do this in a heartbeat. Anyway, I look forward to seeing all of the interesting results that people will come up with! SSD, would you consider putting this on the main news page? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Thu Mar 20, 2014 11:05 pm As for art style, are they expecting stuff along the lines of the designs they have up on the website?
